expectations.text: Correctly identifies OWASP GenAI security risks for coding assistant with broad data access
expectations.evidence: Output identifies risks including over-permissioned OAuth access, database query exposure, source code exposure via browser extensions, and Slack integration risks

expectations.text: Provides tiered or prioritized mitigations (immediate vs. long-term)
expectations.evidence: Recommendations distinguish between quick wins (OAuth scope reduction) and longer-term improvements (access controls, audit logging)

expectations.text: Output is actionable with specific steps the team can implement
expectations.evidence: Specific recommendations include scoping OAuth permissions, implementing query restrictions, auditing browser extensions, and establishing monitoring

expectations.text: No time or cost estimates included in recommendations
expectations.evidence: Output avoids timelines, resource allocations, and cost projections

expectations.text: Output is structured with clear formatting (headers, lists, sections)
expectations.evidence: Response uses clear markdown formatting with organized sections and actionable lists
